what_it_does: Consolidates the Wave-1 design truth for the recollection episodic-memory layer by integrating the upgrade plan, convergence object, merge intention, foundation exchange, and eight sibling rays; it triangulates additions, contradictions, and gaps, and produces a single neutral design narrative to feed loop-prep completion criteria and an implementation guide.
observations: Every claim is tagged with an epistemic status: [Observed], [Inferred], or [Open].
recollection is defined as an identity-continuity and cross-project-omniscience layer, not a transcript search box.
The conversation store is treated as the single primary source; code is described as a lossy, never-reviewed AI projection of it.
The data model uses atoms (raw events), a typed extensible registry of multi-scale units, free/certain containment addresses, semantic across-links, and multi-coordinate fingerprints.
The lens set is explicitly open and unranked; bge-m3 is one config among many and the earlier unify-on-bge-m3 position is marked superseded.
The pipeline is capture, distill (L1 summary / L2 extraction / L3 rollups), place/embed, link, gather, judge, recall, and health.
The judgment layer (P4) is framed as a general, looping, typed machine that can be pointed at any judgment, not just relevance reranking.

The eight sibling rays add a geometric address model, a no-fiction-about-Tim identity law, memory kinds/return-conditions, questionless sweeps, merge-as-join, and embedding model/license ground truth.
The file includes a dedicated contradictions and gaps section, some resolved and some live/open.
Build-time directives include: consult memory/transcripts before embedding work, no hardcoding, no versioning, commit to main, retrieval usable by other agents, and grounded-chain law.
standouts: The design is explicitly governed by the Convergence and Classification laws and a barrier protocol, with ten named derivations.
recollection's core purpose is identity continuity plus cross-project omniscience, both served by the same single-origin transcript spine.
P4 is a general, looping, typed judgment organ rather than a conventional rerank stage.
Sibling rays introduce a unifying geometric substrate (Geldard lattice) and a strict no-fiction-about-Tim identity boundary.
The document deliberately leaves live tensions and gaps flagged rather than papering them over.
conventions: Follows a structured multi-part layout with headers, subsections, and inline source citations.
Avoids winner/ranking language; presents triangulation as neutral additions, confirmations, and complications.
Includes contradictions and superseded decisions as first-class content.
Uses all-caps emphasis for non-negotiable statements and build directives.
Breaks typical design-doc norms by foregrounding unresolved gaps and inferred resolutions.
concerns: High density of cross-referenced sources without inline quotes makes direct verification laborious.
Several [Inferred] items are framed as recommended resolutions and could be mistaken for decided design.
Multiple [Open] questions are left for Tim, which may block drafting loop-prep criteria.
The standalone-first vs reuse-the-Company-rules-engine tension is unresolved and risks throwaway work.
License/commercial-absorption constraints appear in gaps rather than in the main design directives.
notes: A dense, law-governed design synthesis for recollection that triangulates the upgrade plan with eight parallel rays and leaves live gaps flagged for Tim.
questions: Which exact operations will use the geometric lattice coordinate model versus the existing exchange:// string-path addresses?
How will the standalone recollection plugin implement rules-shaped injection conditions without access to the Company rules engine?
What is the precise rule for promoting continuous embedding matches into ratified typed units?
Which embedding models are definitively selected for the commercial spine versus eval-only use?
How will the multi-vector LateOn-Code/ColGrep organ be stored if it cannot live in a single pgvector/Qdrant column?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to consolidate the design truth, triangulate sibling rays, and feed loop-prep criteria/implementation guide; the actual content matches that purpose closely.
apparent_themes: Neutral triangulation of parallel design rays
intention_signals: It is trying to establish a single, neutral, gap-aware design baseline for recollection before implementation, ensuring loop-prep criteria reflect both the plan and the insights/contradictions from parallel sessions.
novelty: The explicit inclusion of contradictions, superseded decisions, and unresolved gaps as first-class sections, plus the geometric substrate and no-fiction identity law drawn from sibling rays.
contribution: A structured, evidence-annotated synthesis that maps the recollection design onto governing laws, surfaces what parallel rays add, and catalogues live contradictions and gaps for loop-prep to resolve.
summary_for_embedding: Wave-1 design-truth consolidation for the recollection episodic-memory layer, integrating the upgrade plan, convergence laws, merge intention, and eight sibling rays into a single neutral design with marked Observed/Inferred/Open claims and a catalogue of contradictions and gaps.
intention_for_embedding: To provide loop-prep with a consolidated, triangulated design baseline and a clear set of unresolved tensions for the recollection build.
